title: LSV Modern Ultimate Technic
description: This Modpack brings back the old FeedTheBeast Ultimate/Tekkit feeeling in Modern MineCraft 1.21
body:
# FTB Reborn

## Old Tekkit meets new MC Version in the LSV Better Modern Technic Modpack
 

**This Modpack brings back the old FeedTheBeast Ultimate/Tekkit feeeling**   
**in Modern MineCraft 1.21**  

 

LSV has arround 300 mods and countless quests and a built in proper endgame. 

LSV has something for everyone: magic, technology, exploration, and everything in-between. 

  


- ✔️ including Industrial Foregoing
- ✔️ including modern Buildcraft alternatives
- ✔️ are you missing the old solar pannels? This Modpack covers you
- ✔️ Modern Magic Mods
- ✔️ A lot of new exploring in the Overworld and new Dimensions
- ✔️ better Ambients
- ✔️ Modern Pipe Solution
- ✔️ this modpack is for all the oldschool IC2 players who want the new 1.21 experience
- ✔️ better performance than old Versions 
- ✔️ features: good server and client performance/fps thanks to handpicked performance Mods
 
 

 

Balanced Modgameplay for a smooth experience! This Modpack will be kept updated to guarantee the best player experience.

 

 

The LSV Modern Ultimate Technic Team
